features.description: User can view list of orders
acceptance_criteria: OrdersPage displays order list from API
Empty state shown when no orders
features.notes: Implemented in boilerplate. See OrdersPage.vue + useOrders composable

features.description: User can create a new order via form

acceptance_criteria: Cancel button visible on pending orders
Order status updates in UI after cancel

features.description: Storybook stories for core UI components
features.notes: Completed 2026-06-04 — React: 66 stories (BaseButton 18, BaseInput 17, SearchField 12, OrderList 9, OrderForm 10). Quasar: Storybook configured with .storybook/, QBaseButton, QBaseInput, OrderList, OrderForm, AppLayout, OrdersPage stories complete.

acceptance_criteria: Storybook tests run in CI pipeline
features.notes: Completed 2026-06-04 — Added .github/workflows/storybook-ci.yml for both React and Quasar. React has playwright.config.ts + tests/storybook.spec.ts with 25+ visual regression tests. Quasar has playwright.config.ts ready.

features.description: Playwright E2E tests for critical paths
